summary: Completed testing of Germany Fair page redesign with colorful gradient cards and Berlin office footer addition. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Branding section successfully redesigned with colorful gradient cards (amber, slate, emerald, blue) instead of flat dark boxes
All 4 brand stat cards display with proper gradients: 4000+ Germany Visas (amber-orange), 14yrs Experience (slate), Best Success Rate (emerald-teal), ICEF (blue-indigo)
Footer has 4 columns: About, Fair Locations, Berlin Office, Contact India
Berlin Office section displays correct address: Belziger Strasse 69-71, 10823, Berlin, Germany
Berlin Office shows correct phone number: +49 1577 4493633
All 4 countdown timers still working on schedule cards (Jammu, Pathankot, Amritsar, Ludhiana)
Form submission successfully creates germany_fair leads (confirmed in dashboard)
Thank you modal appears after successful form submission
Dashboard login works with admin@visaxpert.com credentials
Dashboard shows germany_fair leads confirming form integration is working
All interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) remain clickable and functional
